utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each one is fully specified with appropriate details: 
1. property – includes type, location, price, currency, size, rooms, accessibility, outdoor space, parking, and viewing details. Fully detailed.
2. financing – provides purchase method, documentation, budget range, approval timeline, and purchase capability. Fully detailed.
3. legal_services – includes service name, cost, currency, service level, included features, and timeline. Fully detailed.
4. moving_services – includes service name, cost, currency, service level, specialization, included features, and timeline flexibility. Fully detailed.
5. setup_services – includes utility and property inspection details with costs, currencies, services, and timelines. Fully detailed.
6. total_budget – includes property cost, service costs, total, currency, within_budget flag, and timeline. Fully detailed.
All six items are present and fully specified according to the required format.
